role.description: One of: STUDENT | COMPANY | ACADEMIC_SUPERVISOR | SITE_SUPERVISOR | ADMIN

recipientId.description: User ID of the person to start a conversation with

Partial_LogbookEntryBody_.description: Make all properties in T optional

Partial_InternshipBody_.description: Make all properties in T optional

coverLetterText.description: Optional cover letter text (alternative to uploading a file)

status.description: APPLIED | REVIEWED | INTERVIEW_SCHEDULED | ACCEPTED | REJECTED | WITHDRAWN

info.title: Internship Monitoring & Connecting System API
info.description: Full-stack platform bridging students, companies, and supervisors throughout the internship lifecycle.

post.description:
Register a new user account.
An email verification link is sent after successful registration.

Authenticate with email and password.
Returns a JWT bearer token.

get.description: Verify a user's email address using the token sent by email.

post.description:
Request a password reset link.
Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration.
Reset password using the token from the reset email.

get.description: Get the currently authenticated user's profile.
Get the authenticated student's profile

post.description:
Upload a profile photo for the student.
Send as multipart/form-data with field name `photo`.

Upload a CV document for the student.
Send as multipart/form-data with field name `cv`.

get.description: Get the authenticated supervisor's profile
Get the authenticated company's profile

post.description:
Upload a company logo.
Send as multipart/form-data with field name `logo`.

get.description: List all users (Admin only)

patch.description: Toggle a user's active status (Admin only)

get.description: List all reports generated by the authenticated user
List all reports in the system (Admin only)

Get placement analytics data for dashboard charts.
Includes enrollment trends, application statuses, and average evaluation scores.

post.description:
Generate a logbook summary PDF for the authenticated student.
Returns a Cloudinary URL to the generated PDF.
Generate a logbook summary PDF for a specific student (Supervisor / Admin).
Generate an evaluation report PDF for an enrollment.
Generate a completion certificate PDF for an enrollment.

Generate an institutional analytics Excel report (Admin only).
Returns a Cloudinary URL to the generated .xlsx file.

get.description: Get the 50 most recent notifications for the authenticated user

patch.description: Mark a single notification as read
Mark all notifications as read for the authenticated user

get.description: Get all conversations for the authenticated user

post.description:
Start or retrieve an existing conversation with another user.
Returns the conversation object (idempotent).

get.description: Get all messages in a conversation

post.description:
Send a message in a conversation.
File attachments are handled via multipart/form-data in the actual endpoint.
Real-time delivery is handled via Socket.IO (`conversation:{id}` room).

get.description: Get all logbook entries for the authenticated student

post.description:
Create a new logbook entry (Student only).
File attachment is handled via multipart/form-data in the actual endpoint.

put.description: Update an existing logbook entry (Student only)

get.description: Get logbook entries for a specific student (Supervisor / Admin)
Get attendance summary for the authenticated student

post.description: Log attendance for a student (Site Supervisor / Admin)

get.description: Browse all open internship listings (public)

post.description: Create a new internship listing (Company only)

get.description: Get a single internship by ID (public)

delete.description: Delete an internship listing (Company or Admin)

post.description: Toggle bookmark on an internship (Student only)

get.description: Get current student's bookmarked internships
Get internships posted by the authenticated company

post.description:
Submit a supervisor evaluation for an enrolled student.
Requires ACADEMIC_SUPERVISOR or SITE_SUPERVISOR role.

get.description: Get all evaluations for a specific enrollment

post.description: Submit a student self-assessment (Student only)

get.description: Get all self-assessments for the authenticated student
Get all applications submitted by the authenticated student

post.description:
Apply to an internship.
File uploads (coverLetter, cv, additionalDoc) are handled via multipart/form-data
in the actual endpoint — use the REST client for file uploads.

get.description: Get all applications for a specific internship (Company only)

patch.description: Update application status — accept, reject, or move to review (Company only)

post.description: Schedule an interview for an application (Company only)
